# OpenClienting

> Open-source venture clienting knowledge base where SMEs and startups share real problem templates, pilot frameworks, and verified outcomes.

OpenClienting is a peer-validated library of the problems companies are actively sourcing solutions for, the requirements those solutions must meet, the pilot frameworks used to evaluate them, and the success reports from pilots that worked. Venture clienting is the model where an established company becomes a paying client of a startup whose solution already works — no equity, no accelerator, just a normal vendor engagement around a specific problem.

Every contribution is moderated before publication, authored attributions are optional (anonymity per submission), and successful pilots are flagged with verification metadata that is visible to anyone.

## About

- [What is venture clienting?](https://openclienting.org/en/venture-clienting)
- [Browse all problems](https://openclienting.org/en/problems)
- [Browse verified organizations](https://openclienting.org/en/organizations)
- [Submit a problem](https://openclienting.org/en/submit)

## Markdown versions

Per-problem, per-org, and per-page Markdown alternatives are exposed at a
`/md` suffix on each page path. They are intended for answer engines and
LLM crawlers and carry the same per-row anonymity gating as the HTML pages.

- [Venture clienting explainer (Markdown, English)](https://openclienting.org/en/venture-clienting/md)
- [Venture clienting explainer (Markdown, German)](https://openclienting.org/de/venture-clienting/md)
- [What is venture clienting? (Markdown, English)](https://openclienting.org/en/venture-clienting/what-is-venture-clienting/md)
- [What is venture clienting? (Markdown, German)](https://openclienting.org/de/venture-clienting/what-is-venture-clienting/md)
- [Venture clienting vs corporate venture capital (Markdown, English)](https://openclienting.org/en/venture-clienting/venture-clienting-vs-corporate-venture-capital/md)
- [Venture clienting vs corporate venture capital (Markdown, German)](https://openclienting.org/de/venture-clienting/venture-clienting-vs-corporate-venture-capital/md)
- [Startup pilot framework (Markdown, English)](https://openclienting.org/en/venture-clienting/startup-pilot-framework/md)
- [Startup pilot framework (Markdown, German)](https://openclienting.org/de/venture-clienting/startup-pilot-framework/md)
- [Problem template (Markdown, English)](https://openclienting.org/en/venture-clienting/problem-template/md)
- [Problem template (Markdown, German)](https://openclienting.org/de/venture-clienting/problem-template/md)
- [SME open innovation (Markdown, English)](https://openclienting.org/en/venture-clienting/sme-open-innovation/md)
- [SME open innovation (Markdown, German)](https://openclienting.org/de/venture-clienting/sme-open-innovation/md)
- [Verified success report (Markdown, English)](https://openclienting.org/en/venture-clienting/verified-success-report/md)
- [Verified success report (Markdown, German)](https://openclienting.org/de/venture-clienting/verified-success-report/md)
- Individual problem detail pages are available as Markdown by appending
  `/md` to any problem URL, e.g.
  `https://openclienting.org/en/problems/{id}/md`. Each HTML problem page
  advertises its Markdown alternative via
  `<link rel="alternate" type="text/markdown">`.
- Verified organization profiles are available as Markdown at
  `https://openclienting.org/en/organizations/{slug}/md` (and `/de/...`).
  Each HTML profile page advertises its Markdown alternative via
  `<link rel="alternate" type="text/markdown">`.

## Languages

- English: https://openclienting.org/en
- German: https://openclienting.org/de

## Discovery

- Sitemap (all indexable URLs): https://openclienting.org/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://openclienting.org/robots.txt
